argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 10; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); const items = document.querySelectorAll('[data-e2e="live-side-nav-item"]'); if (items.length > 0) { return Array.from(items).slice(0, limit).map(function(el, i) { const nameEl = el.querySelector('[data-e2e="live-side-nav-name"]'); const countEl = el.querySelector('[data-e2e="person-count"]'); const link = el.querySelector('a'); return { index: i + 1, streamer: nameEl ? nameEl.textContent.trim() : '', viewers: countEl ? countEl.textContent.trim() : '-', url: link ? link.href : '' }; }); } const cards = document.querySelectorAll('[data-e2e="discover-list-live-card"]'); if (cards.length > 0) { return Array.from(cards).slice(0, limit).map(function(card, i) { const text = card.textContent.trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' '); const link = card.querySelector('a[href*="/live"]'); const viewerMatch = text.match(/(\d[\d,.]*)\s*watching/); return { index: i + 1, streamer: text.replace(/LIVE.*$/, '').trim().substring(0, 40), viewers: viewerMatch ? viewerMatch[1] : '-', url: link ? link.href : '' }; }); } const liveLinks = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/live"]')).filter(a => a.href.includes('/@')); return Array.from(liveLinks).slice(0, limit).map(function(link, i) { const match = link.href.match(/@([^/]+)/); const streamer = match ? match[1] : link.textContent.trim().substring(0, 30); return { index: i + 1, streamer: streamer, viewers: '-', url: link.href }; }); }
